subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-04-22
subcodes.first_line: In reality all my movements are fraught with danger. The Favors and Graces of the Blessed Perfection have been always with me.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
